description: Sector overlay for French pharmaceutical manufacturing, importation, distribution, marketing authorization, pharmacovigilance, medical products, and regulated-drug documentation.

metadata.scope: France-only sector overlay controls for Pharmaceuticals. Intended to be used with france_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official French/EU legal, regulatory, supervisory, and guidance sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: ANSM medicine and health-product safety materials

rules.title: Marketing authorization or product-approval evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for AMM, ANSM, marketing authorization, product approval, registration, or regulated medicine evidence.

required_signals: autorisation de mise sur le marché

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Pharmacovigilance or adverse-event reporting evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for pharmacovigilance, adverse-event reporting, signal management, risk-management plan, or medicine-safety monitoring evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Manufacturing, quality, batch, or GMP evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for GMP/BPF, batch release, quality control, manufacturing authorization, traceability, or distribution controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Patient/customer health-data privacy evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for health data, patient data, pharmacovigilance privacy, GDPR/RGPD, consent, retention, or data-subject rights evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this sector control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified France compliance/legal reviewer must confirm applicability, current legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
